recommended_gate: Promote only if landing page has downloadable dataset, database, workbook, table, codebook, file inventory, or source-family page with multiple rows.
queries: replication database original | replication workbook effect size | replicability codebook original study | reproducibility file inventory replication | replication master data original | replication source data effect

recommended_gate: Promote project pages and collections; route single papers to individual-paper worklist unless they expose a multi-row artifact.
queries: many labs replication data | many-lab replication | multi-lab replication effect | multi-site replication original | multicenter replication original | collaborative replication OSF

recommended_gate: Classify as repository package unless new-data replication or explicit original-vs-follow-up effect rows exist.
queries: computational reproducibility robustness replication package | robustness reproducibility original analyses | reproduced original analyses robustness checks | reanalysis replication original study | reproduction replication effect size | same data different analysis replicability

recommended_gate: Promote only if claims are linked to source papers and repeatability evidence; otherwise context only.
queries: claim database replicability | claim verification scientific replication | research claims robustness replicability | credibility scores research claims replication | SCORE claims replicability | repliCATS claims dataset

recommended_gate: Treat venue/challenge group as source family; route individual reports separately unless extracting normalized rows.
queries: reproducibility challenge original paper | replication report OpenReview | NeurIPS reproducibility challenge report | ICLR reproducibility challenge code | benchmark replicability published claims | ReplicatorBench SCORE

recommended_gate: Reject DNA/RNA/viral/cell replication; require study-level original target plus independent reproduction/replication evidence.
queries: preclinical replication original effect | target validation reproducibility published data | biomedical multicenter replication | reproducibility initiative biomedical replication | real-world evidence reproducibility robustness | healthcare database direct replication

recommended_gate: If a collection enumerates papers only, route collection as source-family lead and papers as individual worklist; require reusable data for corpus promotion.
queries: replication studies journal collection | registered replication report data | replication section journal | special issue replication data | Preclinical Reproducibility and Robustness | Royal Society Open Science replication studies

recommended_gate: If title is only replication data/files/package for an original paper and no independent replication is described, route to repository package or context, not corpus.
queries: replication data for replication study | replication files for replication study | data and code for replication original | supplementary data replication effect size | analysis data reproducibility initiative | replication package replicability

recommended_gate: Require project/source-object evidence and translate descriptions before classification.
queries: reprodutibilidade replicabilidade dados | replicacion base de datos estudio original | reproduccion robustez articulos | replication reproductibilite base de donnees | Reproduzierbarkeit Replikation Daten | replicatieonderzoek data

recommended_gate: Project or grant records become manual investigation until linked to completed outputs, data, or publications.
queries: replication studies funded project database | replication research grant results | replication studies programme results | funder replication dataset | registered report replication registry | OSF Registries replication registered report

recommended_gate: Use Wayback/CDX only to recover source-family pages or file links; do not promote archived text without corroboration.
queries: replication database Wayback | CurateScience replication | ReplicationWiki archive | socialsciencesreplicationproject data | File Drawer replication database | PsychFileDrawer replication
